name: Grizzly Discoveries Inc.
description: Grizzly Discoveries Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on developing its highly prospective gold, copper, and cobalt projects in southeastern British Columbia. The company's primary assets include the Greenwood Project, which is host to numerous historical gold-copper mines and prospects, and the Robocop Cobalt-Copper-Silver Project. Grizzly Discoveries is dedicated to creating shareholder value through systematic exploration and discovery in historically productive mining districts.
